title: Kannamcode Cathedral
tagline: Kannamcode Cathedral — heritage city of Kerala

overview.description: Kannamcode Cathedral or Kannamcode St. Thomas Orthodox Cathedral is one of the oldest churches in Central Travancore. The church belongs to the Malankara Orthodox Syrian Church under the Adoor Kadampanad Orthodox Diocese. Kannamcode Cathedral is situated in Adoor, Pathanamthitta, Kerala, India.

Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Moonnalam
topPlaces.description: Moonnalam (Munnalam); is an urban area located in the Adoor Town in Kerala, India. Moonnalam comprises ward 25 and most of the area of ward 26 of the Adoor municipality.

topPlaces.name: Vadakkadathukavu
topPlaces.description: Vadakkadathukavu is a village in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Adoor
topPlaces.description: Kendriya Vidyalaya, Adoor is a Higher Secondary School located in Adoor in the Indian state of Kerala. It operates I to XII grade with Science, Commerce and Computer Science streams in the senior secondary level.

topPlaces.name: Thattayil
topPlaces.description: Thattayil is a village near Pandalam in the Pathanamthitta district, state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Manakala
topPlaces.description: Manakala is a town in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala state, India. It is located in Adoor Thaluk.

topPlaces.name: Faith Theological Seminary, Manakala
topPlaces.description: Faith Theological Seminary, Manakala (FTS Manakala) is a Pentecostal theological seminary located in Manakala, Pathanamthitta, Kerala, India. It was founded in 1970 and is affiliated with the Senate of Serampore College (University).

topPlaces.name: Ezhamkulam
topPlaces.description: Ezhamkulam is a village in Adoor Thaluk of Pathanamthitta district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located about 5 km from central Adoor.

topPlaces.name: Peringanadu
topPlaces.description: Peringanadu is a village in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala state, India. It is known by the presence of Peringanadu Trichenda Mangalam Mahadeva Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kannamcode Cathedral?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kannamcode Cathedral is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kannamcode Cathedral?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (77 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (78 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kannamcode Cathedral?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kannamcode Cathedral at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kannamcode Cathedral?
faq.a: Stays in Kannamcode Cathedral start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kannamcode Cathedral?
faq.a: The top attractions are Moonnalam, Vadakkadathukavu, Kendriya Vidyalaya, Adoor, Thattayil, Manakala.
